nasb.text: They also made bells of pure gold, and put the bells between the pomegranates all around on the hem of the robe,

esv.text: They also made bells of pure gold, and put the bells between the pomegranates all around the hem of the robe, between the pomegranates—

cnv.text: 他又用純金做鈴鐺，把金鈴安放在石榴中間，就是安放在外袍周圍底邊上的石榴中間：

ccb.text: 又造纯金的铃铛挂在外袍底边的石榴间，
